holdings.infoBox: BRF is an equity ETF with a total of 91 individual holdings.

overview.description: The VanEck Brazil Small-Cap ETF (BRF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Brazil Small-Cap index, a market-cap-weighted index of Brazilian small-cap firms. BRF was launched on May 14, 2009 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Brazil ETFs drop after Bolsonaro supporters storm Brazilian Congress
data.text: Shares of exchange-traded funds that focus on Brazil were falling Monday morning, after rioters supporting former Brazilian President Jair Bolsonaro stormed the country's Congress over the weekend fol...

data.title: VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Brazil ETFs Poised to Move Higher in 2021
data.text: Brazilian equities look set to benefit from a rotation into cyclical stocks as global growth returns. Here are two ETFs to watch.

data.title: Brazil ETFs Trade at Trendline Support
data.text: A recent retracement in Brazilian stocks provides a "buy the dip" opportunity. Trade the country's stocks using these three ETFs.

data.title: Brazil ETFs Jump as Senate Approves Pension Reform
data.text: Brazilian stocks surged Tuesday after the country's Senate approved major social security reforms. Trade Brazilian stocks using these ETFs.
